mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM circle_member WHERE circle_id = #{circleId} AND role IN (1, 2) AND status = 0
SELECT user_id FROM circle_member WHERE circle_id = #{circleId} AND role = 2 AND status = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM circle_member WHERE circle_id = #{circleId} AND status = 0
SELECT circle_id FROM circle_member WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0
SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM circle_member WHERE circle_id = #{circleId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0 )
